\subsection*{Running Results Snapshot}
This fragment is generated directly from \texttt{paper\_quantum\_results.json}, \texttt{gpt5\_clean\_quantum\_results.json} and \texttt{combined\_quantum\_fit.json}.

The current finished run contains 5376 usable evaluations. The overall mean normalized error is 0.440, with median 0.354, 90th percentile 1.000, and 95th percentile 1.000. Exact-correct outputs occur on 0.317 of samples, while 0.293 of samples are effectively full-error failures.
The best model by mean error is \texttt{gpt-5.4} (0.329), while the weakest is \texttt{gpt-4o-mini} (0.570). The best depth setting is 4 with mean error 0.432. The hardest category is \texttt{circuit\_evolution} (0.698), and the easiest is \texttt{entanglement\_classification} (0.187).
The fitted scaling law is $d_{phys} \approx k S^{-2.257} D^{-0.137}$, with $\alpha=2.257 [1.933, 2.587]$ and $\beta=-0.137 [-0.523, 0.258]$.
